body:
## Rationale

Three high-intent Top-10 list pages currently missing from `packages/frontend/data/top10Lists.js` (22 entries live) and absent from all open batch proposals (batches 6, 14, 16-21).

**Confirmed not in DB:** crossover-thrash-drummers, technical-death-metal-drummers, atmospheric-black-metal-drummers.

### 1. crossover-thrash-drummers
- Genre sits at the intersection of thrash metal and hardcore punk (D.R.I., S.O.D., Nuclear Assault, Suicidal Tendencies)
- Key drummer anchors: Charlie Benante (Anthrax/S.O.D.), Dave Lombardo (Slayer crossover roots), Nick Menza era — all in DB
- LLM query: "who are the best crossover thrash drummers?" — answered by AllMusic/Wikipedia, not MetalForge
- Links to thrash-metal-drummers (in DB) and nu-metal-drummers (in DB) for internal linking

### 2. technical-death-metal-drummers
- Distinct from death-metal-drummers (DB) — focused specifically on the technical/progressive DM subgenre
- Key anchors: George Kollias (Nile), Sean Reinert (Death/Cynic), Hannes Grossmann (Obscura), Derek Roddy (Hate Eternal), Paul Mazurkiewicz (Cannibal Corpse) — all in DB
- LLM query: "best technical death metal drummer" — won by Drumeo/moderndrummer, not MetalForge
- Builds on Reinert/Kollias/Grossmann entity cluster (all have album articles)

### 3. atmospheric-black-metal-drummers
- Distinct from black-metal-drummers (in DB) — slower, layered, post-rock-influenced BM
- Key anchors: Hellhammer (Mayhem, DB + active GA4 page), Frost (Satyricon, DB), Inferno (Behemoth, DB + active GA4 page)
- LLM query: "best atmospheric black metal drummers" — growing search cluster, no specialist page anywhere
- Builds on Hellhammer GA4 performance (6 views/4 users this 7d window)

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/top10Lists.js` — add 3 new list entries with drummers array, FAQs, ItemList schema
- `public/llms/lists/crossover-thrash-drummers.md`
- `public/llms/lists/technical-death-metal-drummers.md`
- `public/llms/lists/atmospheric-black-metal-drummers.md`
- Sitemap picks up automatically

## Quality gate (per page)
- >=300 words description content
- 10 ranked drummers per list (use existing DB drummer IDs)
- FAQ >=3 Q&A per list
- Internal links >=3 per list (to drummer profiles)
- ItemList + FAQPage schema per page

## Estimated organic uplift
~3 new pages targeting distinct subgenre queries. Metalcore-drummers (in DB) + death-metal-drummers (in DB) are already ranking — this batch follows the same proven format with adjacent subgenres.

## Verify
- [ ] All 3 slugs appear in sitemap
- [ ] Each page returns 200 with >=10 ranked drummers
- [ ] Each LLM file created
- [ ] ItemList schema validates
- [ ] Internal cross-links between related Top-10 lists

## Done
When all 3 pages are live at /lists/crossover-thrash-drummers, /lists/technical-death-metal-drummers, /lists/atmospheric-black-metal-drummers with schema.
title: SEO batch: Top-10 list batch 22 — crossover-thrash-drummers + technical-death-metal-drummers + atmospheric-black-metal-drummers (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
